_comment: Catalog of known/recommended external skill repositories for agent-meta.
_comment_usage: The agent-meta-manager agent reads this file to help users discover and add external skills via --add-skill.

skills._comment_example: Each entry describes a known skill repo. 'verified' means tested with agent-meta.

example-skill._comment: This is a placeholder entry — replace with real skills as they become available.
example-skill.name: Example Specialist
example-skill.description: Example skill entry — replace with real skills.
